style_name: Teenage Skate Scribble Screenprint Poster Style
summary: A retro skate zine poster style with a distorted central skateboarder cutout, cream paper field, loose red hand-lettered border typography, rough duotone screen-print texture, and a limited navy-gray-green-ochre palette.
prompt_template: Create an image in Teenage Skate Scribble Screenprint Poster style. Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}. Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION} with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP} at {LOCATION}. Place the subject as one oversized central posterized cutout with a compressed crouching or skating pose. Use {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Build the composition on a warm cream paper field with a green skateboard, rail, board, or long prop sweeping across the lower third. Wrap loose red hand-lettered border words reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" around the edges, add small handwritten fragments reading "{SECONDARY_TEXT}", and include {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Add {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Use rough duotone screen-print texture, deep navy clothing, dusty gray pants, mustard ochre skin, dry black speckle, halftone dirt, paper grain, ink skips, imperfect registration, and handmade indie skate zine energy. Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app UI, exact copied reference phrase, clean vector illustration, polished corporate sports poster, glossy 3D text, chrome, neon gradient, luxury editorial lighting, smooth airbrush shading, sterile studio background, perfect typography, long paragraph text, photorealistic clutter, anime, comic superhero style, and skateboard brand logo.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface, exact copied reference phrase, clean vector illustration, polished corporate sports poster, glossy 3D text, chrome, neon gradient, luxury editorial lighting, smooth airbrush shading, sterile studio background, perfect typography, long paragraph text, photorealistic clutter, anime, comic superhero style, skateboard brand logo

variables.SUBJECT: main skateboarder, dancer, musician, courier, student, or youth culture figure
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: crouching, kickflipping, carving, bending, balancing, pushing, leaning, or landing a trick
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: skateboard, longboard, rail, cassette player, record sleeve, camera, backpack, or streetwear object
variables.LOCATION: cream paper poster field, rooftop concrete, schoolyard steps, record shop sidewalk, night market lane, or skate spot
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: red hand-lettered border words, arrows, curls, rough paper grain, screen-print speckles, and sparse doodle marks
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short red handmade headline split around the poster edge
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny supporting handwritten fragments or repeated border notes
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red arrow, looping underline, curled stroke, small star, or hand-drawn motion mark
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized navy top, baggy gray pants, ochre hands, brown shoes, streetwear layers, and rough posterized fabric

variables.SUBJECT: a young rooftop skateboarder
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: folding into a deep crouch while catching a kickflip
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: green skateboard with black trucks and rough ink wheels
variables.LOCATION: open cream paper poster field with hints of rooftop concrete
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: red hand-lettered border words, looping arrows, rough paper grain, and scattered screen-print speckles
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: late sun / grip tape / loose wheels
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red looping arrow under the board
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized deep navy sweatshirt, dusty gray baggy pants, ochre hands, brown skate shoes, rough posterized fabric

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 Teenage Skate Scribble Screenprint Poster image. Case: Rooftop Kickflip Bend. Subject: a young rooftop skateboarder folding into a deep crouch while catching a kickflip with a green skateboard with black trucks and rough ink wheels. Scene: open cream paper poster field with hints of rooftop concrete. Background marks: red hand-lettered border words, looping arrows, rough paper grain, and scattered screen-print speckles. Main red border text: CURB DREAM. Secondary handwritten fragments: late sun / grip tape / loose wheels. Accent: red looping arrow under the board. Wardrobe and color styling: oversized deep navy sweatshirt, dusty gray baggy pants, ochre hands, brown skate shoes, rough posterized fabric. Stretch the action pose across the center, use the board as a wide green lower sweep, place red handwriting in the corners and side margins, and keep the print tactile with halftone dirt and dry black speckle. Avoid watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, brand logos, exact copied reference wording, clean vector polish, glossy 3D, chrome, neon gradients, long paragraph text, and corporate sports ad styling.

Main red border text: CURB DREAM. Secondary handwritten fragments: late sun / grip tape / loose wheels. Accent: red looping arrow under the board. Wardrobe and color styling: oversized deep navy sweatshirt, dusty gray baggy pants, ochre hands, brown skate shoes, rough posterized fabric. Stack the bent body through the center, make the board sweep across the lower third, wrap red handwriting around all edges, and keep the print tactile with halftone dirt and dry black speckle. Avoid watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, brand logos, exact copied reference wording, clean vector polish, glossy 3D, chrome, neon gradients, long paragraph text, and corporate sports ad styling.
